signals.title: Polymarket
signals.triggerEvent: Prediction-market odds may provide a tradable consensus signal.

signals.title: SpaceX
signals.triggerEvent: SpaceX or Starlink IPO signals could create a frontier-company liquidity event.
confirmationConditions: RKLB 20-day return exceeds +10% with supporting volume.
ASTS 20-day return exceeds +10% with supporting volume.
invalidationConditions: RKLB 20-day return falls below -10% or the source thesis reverses.
ASTS 20-day return falls below -10% or the source thesis reverses.

invalidationConditions: AMZN 20-day return falls below -10% or the source thesis reverses.
